{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Silent Herald
| introduced = cradle-13-threshold
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Silent Herald]] is a character who appeared to assist [[Kelsa]] and used [[Ruler techniques]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
